claims.summary: BridgeState keeps Minime observation, bridge-derived evidence, and Astrid interpretation as separate ownership domains.
claims.disposition: verify typed state and compatibility projection parity

claims.summary: Pressure smoothing adapts between bounded short and long windows and retains high-frequency motion and pressure-scar evidence.
claims.disposition: verify dynamic-window pruning and focused tests

claims.summary: Changing live smoothing thresholds, history windows, or telemetry cadence would alter the bridge's felt rendering.
claims.disposition: gate behind exact Mike/operator Tier 5 approval
claims.authority: No live smoothing, history-window, or telemetry-cadence change is authorized.
